semantic.role: Architecture rule definition for the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Defines architectural rules and constraints for the .spine/rules directory
Provides metadata for rule file indexing and drift detection
invariants: Content hash and semantic hash must be consistent with actual file content
Language field is set to 'unsupported' indicating no language-specific processing

English.role: Architecture rule definition for the ArchSpine mirror system

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the schema used for this configuration file
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: Specifies the exact file path within the repository
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: SHA-256 hash of the file content for integrity verification
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: Hash representing the semantic meaning of the file content
parameter_definitions.identity.language: Indicates the programming language; 'unsupported' means no language-specific processing
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: Describes the type of file (e.g., document, code)
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: Defines the directory scope this rule applies to
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: Describes the functional purpose of this configuration
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: Lists subsystems or areas controlled by these settings
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: Explicitly lists items not covered by this configuration
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: Mandatory constraints or safety limits that must be maintained
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: Documents the intended architectural purpose of changes
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Documents the reason for the most recent change
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: Lists publicly exposed interfaces or APIs
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: Records any detected violations of architectural rules
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: Boolean flag indicating whether drift from expected state has been detected
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: Explanation of why drift was detected, if applicable
parameter_definitions.skeleton.declaredSymbols: Lists symbols declared within this file
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.importCount: Number of imports for structural analysis
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.exportCount: Number of exports for structural analysis
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: Indicates if this file is a barrel (re-export) module
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: Indicates if this file contains only type definitions
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: Lists files this configuration depends on
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: Lists files that depend on this configuration
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: Indicates whether the reverse dependency index is fully built
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: Timestamp when this file was last indexed
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: Version of the ArchSpine tool that generated this metadata
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: Stages of the processing pipeline applied to this file

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file serves as the architectural rule definition for the .spine/rules directory. It provides metadata for indexing, integrity verification via content and semantic hashes, and drift detection. The file has no actual rules defined (empty invariants, no architectural intent), which means it acts as a placeholder or template. The 'unsupported' language field indicates no language-specific processing will occur. The drift detection flag is false, meaning the system currently considers this file consistent with its expected state. The primary risk is that without defined invariants or architectural intent, this file provides no actual enforcement of architectural rules, potentially allowing structural drift to go undetected. The reverse index is marked as incomplete, which could lead to incomplete dependency analysis.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine镜像系统的架构规则定义

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义此配置文件所使用的模式版本
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: 指定仓库中的确切文件路径
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: 文件内容的SHA-256哈希值，用于完整性验证
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: 代表文件内容语义含义的哈希值
parameter_definitions.identity.language: 指示编程语言；'unsupported'表示不进行特定语言处理
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: 描述文件类型（例如：文档、代码）
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: 定义此规则适用的目录范围
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: 描述此配置的功能用途
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: 列出受这些设置控制的子系统或领域
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: 明确列出此配置不涵盖的项目
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: 必须维护的强制性约束或安全限制
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: 记录变更的预期架构目的
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: 记录最近一次变更的原因
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: 列出公开暴露的接口或API
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: 记录检测到的任何架构规则违规
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: 布尔标志，指示是否检测到与预期状态的偏离
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: 如果检测到偏离，解释其原因
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: 列出导出的符号或模块
parameter_definitions.skeleton.declaredSymbols: 列出此文件中声明的符号
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.importCount: 用于结构分析的导入数量
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.exportCount: 用于结构分析的导出数量
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: 指示此文件是否为桶（重新导出）模块
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: 指示此文件是否仅包含类型定义
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: 列出此配置所依赖的文件
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: 列出依赖此配置的文件
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: 指示反向依赖索引是否已完全构建
parameter_definitions.graph.symbolEdges: 跟踪符号级别的依赖关系
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: 此文件上次被索引的时间戳
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: 生成此元数据的ArchSpine工具版本
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: 应用于此文件的处理流水线阶段

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置文件作为.spine/rules目录的架构规则定义。它提供用于索引、通过内容和语义哈希进行完整性验证以及漂移检测的元数据。该文件没有定义实际规则（不变量为空，没有架构意图），这意味着它充当占位符或模板。'unsupported'语言字段表示不会进行特定语言处理。漂移检测标志为false，意味着系统当前认为此文件与其预期状态一致。主要风险在于，如果没有定义不变量或架构意图，此文件无法提供实际的架构规则执行，可能导致结构漂移未被检测到。反向索引标记为不完整，可能导致依赖分析不完整。
